steps.title: Continue the step sequence
steps.content: The passage lists three inquiry steps: first research the question, then come up with a hypothesis, and third develop an experiment. The blank must mark the middle item in that ordered sequence.

steps.title: Use ordered logic
steps.content: Choice A gives an example, Choice C gives a consequence, and Choice D gives replacement or contrast; none matches a numbered process. The sequence marker fits between First and Third. The answer is B.
